revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:European history categories by period]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{{Navbox |name = European history categories by period |title = [[:Category:History of Europe by period|European history categories by period]] |state = collapsed |listclass = hlist |list1 = *[[:Category:Prehistoric Europe|Prehistoric]] **[[:Category:Copper Age Europe|Copper Age]] **[[:Category:Bronze Age Europe|Bronze Age]] **[[:Category:Iron Age Europe|Iron Age]] *[[:Category:Ancient Europe|Ancient]] ** [[:Category:Classical antiquity|Classical antiquity]] ** [[:Category:Late antiquity|Late antiquity]] * [[:Category:Middle Ages|Middle Ages]] * [[:Category:Renaissance|Renaissance]] * [[:Category:Early modern period|Early modern]] * [[:Category:Late modern Europe|Late modern]] ** [[:Category:Industrial Revolution|Industrial Revolution]]
}}<noinclude> {{doc|content= {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Europe history navigational boxes| ]] [[Category:Europe list-linking templates|History categories by period]] [[Category:Historical period templates]] }} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Europe history navigational boxes
Bot: remove obsolete category Europe list-linking templates
Bot: remove obsolete category Historical period templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=European_history_categories_by_period here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
